name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Fixed

- RuntimeStateProbe Assertions now has the correct MCP schema: array with object items.
- Typed tool parameter deserialization accepts a single object for JArray-backed properties and safely normalizes it to a one-item array.
- MCP smoke regression now verifies both the canonical Assertions schema and tolerant single-object execution.

### Previous Changes

- WorkSession semantic review detects stale/noisy scene baselines and returns a compact skipped status instead of fake deleted/created changes.
- BatchActions post-action WorkSession review is lightweight by default.
- ManageGameObject SetComponentProperty handles Unity object references more reliably.
